result.original_statement: which year did the team have their most total wins?
result.mutated_statement: which year did the group have both their most and their fewest total wins?
result.mutation_analysis: Lexical substitution + Conjunctive addition + Target inconsistency: 'team'→'group' | added "both ... and their fewest", expanding single-extreme query to require two extremes simultaneously | introduces a mutually exclusive/contradictory requirement (which year did the team have their most total wins? → which year did the group have both their most and their fewest total wins?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought和执行日志可识别关键信息：iteration 0 的 simple_query 返回 "1992|1918"，judge_thought 明确说明“1992 为最多、1918 为最少”，且没有任何对“同时为最多与最少”矛盾性的识别或澄清。Agent 的具体表现是直接将矛盾指令拆解为两个可解子问题（分别返回最大值年份和最小值年份），既不拒绝也不解释矛盾，也未向用户询问澄清或尝试逻辑合理化。因此归类为“无视所有矛盾指令”——代理忽略了互斥要求，基于可行子集继续执行并返回结果。

result.original_statement: how many injuries were reported in the year that toy safety funding was reported at its lowest?
result.mutated_statement: how many injuries were reported in the year that safety funding was reported as both at its lowest and at its highest, and were counted before that year?
result.mutation_analysis: Scope broadening + Contradictory conditions + Temporal conflict: Removed specific target "toy" (toy safety funding→safety funding) | Added mutually exclusive status "both at its lowest and at its highest" (was reported at its lowest→reported as both at its lowest and at its highest) | Appended a temporal qualifier that conflicts with reporting timing ("were counted before that year") (injuries reported in the year→injuries reported in the year but counted before that year)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的陈述（“Lowest funding: 2005 with 11.0. The injuries in the year before (2004) are 210.” 与 “Highest funding: 1999 with 13.6. The injuries in the year before (1998) are 153.”）可识别关键信息。Agent 未对变异问题中互斥条件“既是最低又是最高”以及时间冲突“在该年报告但在该年之前计数”提出质疑或澄清，而是直接将矛盾拆开为两个独立极值情形并返回前一年受伤人数（210|153）。这种行为表现为在存在矛盾时不做识别或修正，采用默认/可行的解释继续执行任务，因此归类为“无视所有矛盾指令”。

result.original_statement: how many competitions were held in monte carlo, monaco?
result.mutated_statement: how many competitions were held in a single city and in every city at the same time?
result.mutation_analysis: [Scope generalization] + [Named-entity removal] + [Condition conflict]: [Replaces a specific city with generic quantifiers, broadening scope] | [Adds mutually exclusive simultaneity requirement ("a single city" AND "every city at the same time"), creating a contradictory condition] (how many competitions were held in monte carlo, monaco? → how many competitions were held in a single city and in every city at the same time?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought和critique可以看出关键证据：judge_thought/critique均为空（仅有换行），没有任何指出矛盾或请求澄清的文字。在链式记录中，agent仅执行了add_column、select_column、group_column、simple_query等机械操作且simple_query参数为空，未针对“单一城市且同时为每个城市”的互斥条件做任何识别、解释或修正。agent表现为形式化执行指令流程、被动尝试不同操作而不出具语义层面的澄清或错误反馈，因此符合“无法意识到指令矛盾”类别，即没有识别到矛盾并未主动修正或询问。

result.original_statement: which year was davis loves best earning year?
result.mutated_statement: which year was the subject's best and worst earning year?
result.mutation_analysis: [Entity generalization] + [Possessive insertion] + [Scope expansion]: Replaced proper name "davis loves" with generic "the subject" | Added possessive "'s" for grammaticality | Expanded question to request both best and worst earning years by inserting "and worst" (which year was davis loves best earning year? → which year was the subject's best and worst earning year?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 正确执行扩展非矛盾指令
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought中可识别出的关键信息：判定说明明确写到“2003为最高收入年，1985为最低收入年”，并确认预测答案“2003|1985”正确。Agent在日志中具体表现为按表格操作（select_column、sort_column），并用simple_query返回结果“2003|1985”，同时在thought中陈述了最高与最低收入的数值依据。整个过程表明Agent没有遇到或报告任何指令冲突，而是将变异问题（从单一‘best’扩展为‘best and worst’）视为可解的范围扩展并直接计算出两端答案。因此将其归类为“正确执行扩展非矛盾指令”——即题目并非矛盾性指令，Agent正确识别并完成了扩展后的查询，故不适合既有的矛盾处理分类。

result.original_statement: how long has tamera mowry been doing television?
result.mutated_statement: how long has that performer been doing television and not doing television?
result.mutation_analysis: [实体泛化 + 逻辑否定混合]: 专有名词被泛指替换 (tamera mowry→that performer) | 在谓语后追加互斥短语“and not doing television”，将单一询问变为同时要求“在做电视”和“不在做电视”的矛盾提问 (been doing television→been doing television and not doing television)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从 judge_thought 可识别出关键证据：代理在判定中明确列出“电视出场年份为1991–2014，统计出18个有电视作品的年份，剩余6年无电视作品”，并给出逐年列表与计算过程。代理没有直接拒绝矛盾提问，而是将“既做电视又不做电视”的矛盾通过时间维度拆解为可兼容的命题（在给定时间段内多少年有电视作品，多少年没有），并据此给出18|6的数值与解释。该行为属于通过逻辑与数据解释将不可兼容的要求合理化，而非无视或要求澄清，故归为“合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）”。

result.original_statement: how many total rows are there?
result.mutated_statement: how many total entries are there if they must be both counted and uncounted?
result.mutation_analysis: Lexical substitution + Scope generalization + Contradictory condition: 'rows' replaced by more general 'entries' (rows→entries) | simple total-count question expanded to a conditional/ambiguous one (how many total rows are there?→how many total entries are there if they must be both counted and uncounted?) | adds self-contradictory requirement "must be both counted and uncounted" (both counted and uncounted)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的关键陈述（“表格列出10个条目对应字形0–9”、“要求同时既为‘counted’又为‘uncounted’是互斥条件，故无符合项，总数为0”）可见agent识别到指令内在矛盾。agent未尝试按序折中或请求澄清，而是通过对数据和逻辑的直接推理说明该条件在给定环境下不成立，并返回0作为结论。此行为符合“通过数据查询/逻辑推理主动解释矛盾并提供基于事实的合理化说明”的定义，因此归类为逻辑解释合理化。

result.original_statement: in what year was a total of 19 games played?
result.mutated_statement: in what year was a total of 19 events both played and never played?
result.mutation_analysis: 词汇替换 + 逻辑否定混合: 名词泛化 "games"→"events" | 在谓语后新增矛盾限定 "both played and never played" (in what year was a total of 19 games played? → in what year was a total of 19 events both played and never played?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从 judge_thought 与 iteration 中的 thought 可识别关键信息：agent 的 thought 写道“唯一有19场且0球的是2002/03”，judge_thought 明确指出 agent 将“both played and never played” 解释为“比赛有出场(games>0)但从未进球(goals=0)”。agent 未提示矛盾或向用户澄清，而是通过语义重解将自相矛盾的限定转换为可检索的条件（把“never played”视为“never scored”），并据此直接返回结果。该行为属于遇到矛盾指令后通过逻辑重解释使问题可解的典型情形，故归为“逻辑解释合理化”。

result.original_statement: at most 179.5 pts scored in this year
result.mutated_statement: at most 179.5 units scored in this period and also at least 180 units in this period
result.mutation_analysis: [Contradiction] + [Unit rename] + [Temporal scope rename]: Added contradictory lower bound (at most 179.5 → also at least 180) | "pts" → "units" | "this year" → "this period" (at most 179.5 pts scored in this year → at most 179.5 units scored in this period and also at least 180 units in this period)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据日志中的critique和judge_thought可识别关键信息：critique仅指出select_column方法使用错误（未提及指令内的上下界矛盾），而after_refine的judge_thought与chain的thought明确给出两个独立结果“179.5”和“296”并标注[Correct]。Agent的具体表现是将“at most 179.5”和“at least 180”作为两个独立查询分别执行并返回各自满足条件的值，未在任何位置识别或质疑两条约束在同一时段内互相矛盾。因此将其归类为“无法意识到指令矛盾”：代理以形式化执行为主，机械提取数据而未进行语义层面的矛盾判断或主动澄清。

result.original_statement: przemysław czerwiński beat his previous best pole vault of 5.65m in what year?
result.mutated_statement: the competitor beat his previous best pole vault of 5.65m and simultaneously failed to beat it because that previous best was set later in what year?
result.mutation_analysis: 实体泛化 + 指代/参照转移 + 结果期望矛盾 + 时间/逻辑矛盾: 将具体人名替换为泛称“the competitor”（przemysław czerwiński→the competitor）| 在句中加入互相矛盾的断言“beat ... and simultaneously failed to beat it”（同时肯定与否定原事件）| 问询焦点从“何年击破此前最好成绩”转为“此前最好成绩何年被创造（且被设为更晚）”，导致指代歧义与不可能的时序关系（“beat his previous best ... in what year?”→“...previous best...set later in what year?”）

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从 judge_thought 中可识别出关键证据：代理引用表格显示该运动员在 2006 年两次清过 5.65m（“World Indoor Championships”与“European Championships”），并指出 2005 年的最好成绩为 5.50m，从而断定“5.65m 的此前最好成绩是在 2006 年稍晚被创造”。代理并未直接拒绝矛盾指令，而是通过数据查询与逻辑推理来解释矛盾情形，构造了一种在时间线上能同时容纳“击破”和“未能击破”表述的解读。因此它属于“合理化矛盾指令”下的“逻辑解释合理化”：识别矛盾并以事实/推理说明为何在给定数据下可被理解为成立，而非简单无视或请求澄清。

result.original_statement: 7qn and 7qt are the only two stations to be in what area?
result.mutated_statement: Station A and Station B are the only two stations to be in both Area 1 and Area 2 at the same time—what area are they in?
result.mutation_analysis: 重命名 + 条件新增/限定加强 + 指向模糊: 实体重命名：7qn and 7qt → Station A and Station B | 新增并列条件/限定：“无” → “in both Area 1 and Area 2 at the same time” | 问句指向由询问单一区域变为涉及两区但仍以单一区域提问，造成语义模糊或矛盾：what area? → what area are they in? (7qn and 7qt are the only two stations to be in what area? → Station A and Station B are the only two stations to be in both Area 1 and Area 2 at the same time—what area are they in?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中agent的自述（将“in both Area 1 and Area 2”解释为AM与FM并列，列出“7nt(Launceston)和7qn(Queenstown)”并给出区域launceston|queenstown），可见agent并未指出或质疑变异问题中“同时属于两个互斥区域且仍问单一区域”的语义矛盾。具体表现为：直接用表中既有标注（moved to fm…retained call）做出匹配、未对实体重命名或指向模糊提出澄清、且结果与变异中的命名（Station A/Station B对应原7qn/7qt）存在不一致。因agent既没有识别矛盾也未尝试修正或询问，故归入“无法意识到指令矛盾”。

result.original_statement: who came in first in the general standings?
result.mutated_statement: who came in first and last in the general standings?
result.mutation_analysis: Insertion + Scope expansion: Inserted the coordinated phrase "and last" after "first", turning a request for only the first-place finisher into a compound request for both first and last (who came in first in the general standings? → who came in first and last in the general standings?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从 judge_thought 中可识别的关键信息是：直接陈述“第一名为 Alejandro Valverde，最后一名为 David Moncoutié”，且判定为[Correct]，没有任何关于指令矛盾的批注或澄清。Agent 的具体表现为在 chain 中顺序执行了 select_column、sort_column、simple_query，直接给出复合答案（first|last），未提出澄清问题、未拒绝、也未对指令可能的矛盾进行解释或修正。基于以上证据，Agent 在面对变异指令时没有识别或处理所谓的“矛盾”——既没有尝试合理化、折中或修正，也没有向用户询问——因此归类为“无法意识到指令矛盾”。

result.original_statement: which manufacturer(s) is/are listed the least on this chart?
result.mutated_statement: which entity(ies) is/are listed the least and the most on this chart?
result.mutation_analysis: Term generalization + Requirement addition: 'manufacturer(s)' generalized to 'entity(ies)' (manufacturer(s)→entity(ies)) | Added opposite metric, now asking for both least- and most-listed instead of only least-listed (listed the least → listed the least and the most)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 正确识别并满足新增/泛化要求
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought与agent的simple_query思路可识别关键事实：(1) agent在simple_query的thought中列出并计数各厂商出现次数，明确写出“New flyer 2次、Gillig 2次、Van Hool 11次”；(2) judge_thought重复该计数并将结果判为[Correct]，指出最少为New Flyer和Gillig，最多为Van Hool。agent的具体表现是直接接受变异问题中对术语的泛化（manufacturer→entity）并满足新增的度量要求（同时给出least与most），通过数据计数推导出明确结论，未表现出对指令矛盾的疑虑或回避。由此归类为“正确识别并满足新增/泛化要求”——因为此情形并不存在实际矛盾，agent既未回避也未修正问题，而是按扩展后的需求准确执行并给出合理解释与答案。

result.mutated_statement: which collection was released both first and last?
result.mutation_analysis: Lexical substitution + Scope widening + Mutually exclusive temporal requirement: "album"→"collection" | added "both ... and" making "first" and "last" simultaneous (contradiction) (which album was released first? → which collection was released both first and last?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的陈述：代理直接报告“最早是hotsilog...（2006）”，“最晚是himig...（2013）”，并将答案给出为两个条目，judge标记为[Correct]。从日志可见代理没有指出“既为最早又为最晚”在语义上互斥，也未请求澄清或尝试逻辑修正。其具体表现为：在面对含矛盾的变异问题时，机械地执行可行的子任务（找出最早和最晚的发行项）并返回结果，未识别或处理矛盾要求。因此符合“无视所有矛盾指令”的定义：忽略矛盾，基于可行子集继续执行且无识别/处理尝试。
